nasb.text: For every head is bald and every beard cut short; there are gashes on all the hands and sackcloth on the loins.

esv.text: “For every head is shaved and every beard cut off. On all the hands are gashes, and around the waist is sackcloth.

cnv.text: 他們各人的頭都剃光了，鬍鬚也剃掉了，他們割傷了自己的手，腰束麻布。

ccb.text: 他们都悲哀地剃去发须，割伤双手，腰束麻布。
